missing_main_functions: Account Deletion or Cleanup (e.g., handling of unverified accounts after a certain period, GDPR compliance)
Notification or Logging (e.g., audit trail for registration attempts, rate limit events)
missing_sub_functions: Handling of expired verification link beyond resend (e.g., automatic account cleanup or re-registration)
IP-based lockout for account creation rate limit (currently only per IP, but lockout duration not specified; should be tested if implemented)
Concurrent registration attempts from same IP (e.g., race conditions)
Verification link tampering or replay attacks
duplicate_functions: FUNC003 (Error Message Validation) overlaps with validation checks in SUB001, SUB002, SUB003, SUB005, SUB006, SUB007; consider integrating error message validation into respective sub-functions rather than a separate main function.
unclear_categories: CAT002 (Disposable Email Domain Blocking) - test intent does not specify expected error message or behavior when list is outdated; unclear how to test dynamic list updates.
CAT008 (Rate Limit Rolling Window Reset) - test intent is vague; should clarify whether the window is sliding or fixed.
CAT016 (New Link Request After Expiry) - test intent does not specify if the new link resets the 24-hour validity or inherits the original expiry; needs clarification.
recommendations: Add a main function for 'Account Lifecycle Management' covering account deletion, cleanup of unverified accounts, and GDPR data removal.
Merge FUNC003 into respective sub-functions to avoid duplication and improve test organization.
Clarify CAT002 by specifying the expected error message (even if placeholder) and how to handle dynamic disposable domain lists.
Clarify CAT008 to specify whether the rate limit window is sliding or fixed (e.g., 15-minute fixed window vs. rolling).
Clarify CAT016 to specify whether the new verification link resets the 24-hour expiry or continues from the original registration time.
Add sub-functions for IP-based lockout on account creation (if implemented) and for handling concurrent requests.
Add test categories for verification link security (e.g., tampering, replay, token uniqueness).
Include negative testing for edge cases such as empty email, empty password, whitespace-only inputs, and SQL injection attempts.
Consider adding a sub-function for 'Email Delivery Failure Handling' to cover scenarios where the external email service is down or returns an error.
